channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: ☢️ Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant Reaching Point of No Return, Rosatom Warns
item.description: The head of Russia state nuclear corporation Rosatom warned that increased Ukrainian attacks near the Russian-held Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant are pushing the situation to a critical point, raising fears of a nuclear catastrophe in southeastern Ukraine.

item.title: 💰 Iran War Costs Global Companies Over $25 Billion and Counting
item.description: Businesses worldwide are grappling with soaring energy prices, fractured supply chains, and severed trade routes as Iran maintains its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz, with the economic toll mounting daily.

item.title: 🛢️ US Extends Russian Oil Sanctions Waiver Amid Iran War Disruption
item.description: The US Treasury announced a 30-day extension of sanctions waivers allowing purchases of Russian seaborne oil to help energy-vulnerable countries cope with supply disruptions caused by the Iran conflict.

item.title: 📉 Global Bond Rout Deepens as Inflation Fears Mount
item.description: Sovereign bond yields are racing to decade highs as investors wake up to the risk that the Iran war may deliver a lasting inflationary shock, threatening government, business, and household spending power worldwide.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Creates New Body to Manage Strait of Hormuz as Talks Stall
item.description: Iran announced a new oversight body for the strategic Strait of Hormuz waterway, signaling tighter control as peace talks with the US remain deadlocked and the risk of renewed conflict rises.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba warns of bloodbath if US attacks as Washington imposes sanctions
item.description: President Diaz-Canel warned of a bloodbath if the US attacks Cuba, while the US Treasury sanctioned Cuba's main intelligence agency and top leaders amid reports Havana obtained military drones from Russia and Iran.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Ten countries condemn Israel's interception of Gaza humanitarian flotilla
item.description: Turkey and nine other countries issued a strong condemnation of Israel's attack on a humanitarian flotilla attempting to reach Gaza, calling it a violation of international law.

item.title: 🇮🇱 US asks Israel to keep refueling aircraft at Ben Gurion through 2026
item.description: The US has requested Israel maintain American refueling aircraft at Ben Gurion Airport through the end of 2026, extending military cooperation amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan detains former Chinese activist turned pro-unification politician
item.description: Taiwanese authorities detained a former Chinese democracy activist who became a pro-unification politician, highlighting tensions over Beijing's influence operations on the island.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Senate presidency fight shapes Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The battle for the Philippine Senate presidency will determine how Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial proceeds, with major implications for the country's political future.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan deploys jets and thousands of troops to Saudi Arabia during Iran war
item.description: Pakistan has deployed a jet squadron and thousands of troops to Saudi Arabia as regional tensions escalate with the Iran conflict, marking a significant military commitment.

item.title: 🇬🇱 Greenland says US talks make progress, but island is not for sale
item.description: Greenland officials reported progress in talks with the US on cooperation, while firmly stating the Arctic island is not for sale, amid ongoing American interest in the strategic territory.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia hits Ukraine's Odesa and Dnipro with drones and missiles overnight
item.description: Russian forces struck the Ukrainian cities of Odesa and Dnipro with drones and missiles overnight, officials said, causing damage to infrastructure and civilian areas.

item.title: 🇰🇪 France hosts Africa summit in Kenya as Macron seeks renewed partnerships
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron met with African leaders in Kenya for a summit aimed at resetting France's relationship with the continent amid growing Chinese and Russian influence.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Israel strikes Gaza as humanitarian flotilla blocked
item.description: Israeli forces conducted strikes in Gaza while naval forces intercepted a humanitarian flotilla attempting to deliver aid to the besieged territory.

item.title: 🇺🇦 First Russian recruited from university dies in Ukraine, exposing recruitment campaign
item.description: The first known Russian soldier recruited directly from a university died in combat in Ukraine, revealing the extent of Russia's student recruitment campaign for the war.

item.title: 🇦🇺 Australia orders Chinese investors to divest rare earths company
item.description: Australia ordered Chinese investors to divest from Northern Minerals, a rare earths company, citing national security concerns over critical minerals.

item.title: 🇧🇴 Bolivia protests intensify as Evo Morales supporters block roads
item.description: Supporters of former president Evo Morales have intensified protests with road blockades across Bolivia, creating political instability in the South American nation.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US demands major role in Greenland in closed-door talks
item.description: The New York Times reports on US demands for a significant strategic role in Greenland, highlighting American interest in the Arctic territory's resources and location.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump delays Iran attack as diplomatic push intensifies
item.description: President Trump delayed planned attacks on Iran following diplomatic appeals from Gulf states, with military forces remaining ready at a moment's notice.

item.title: ⚔️ No deal, no exit: US-Iran standoff risks fresh conflict
item.description: Three months after the US and Israel attacked Iran, a US blockade and Tehran's grip on the Strait of Hormuz have created a deadlock with neither side bending and economic pain deepening.

item.title: 💰 Opaque oil deals around Hormuz test the petrodollar
item.description: The US dollar-dominated global oil trading system faces testing as governments turn to increasingly opaque deals with Tehran and Gulf producers to secure supplies amid the Hormuz closure.

item.title: ⛽ India's cooking fuel shortage drives up California's gas prices
item.description: India's cooking gas shortage and California's $6 per gallon gasoline are both symptoms of the worst-ever energy supply disruption caused by the Iran war - and they are directly connected.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia rupiah hits record low, president downplays impact
item.description: The Indonesian rupiah slid to another record low despite central bank intervention, as global oil prices surged, though President Prabowo downplayed the impact on citizens.

item.title: ☢️ Belarus holds nuclear weapons drills, defense ministry says
item.description: Belarus conducted nuclear weapons drills, its defense ministry announced, amid heightened tensions with the West over the Ukraine conflict.
